mapper.sql: id, userId, deviceId, deviceName, calorie, distance, startTime, createTime
mapper.insert: insert into user_sport_device_record (id, userId, deviceId, deviceName, calorie, distance, startTime, createTime) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deviceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calorie,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{distance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into user_sport_device_record
id,
userId,
deviceId,
deviceName,
calorie,
distance,
avgSpeed,
avgGradient,
bpm,
stepSize,
stepCount,
startTime,
createTime,
sportTime,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{deviceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{calorie,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{distance,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{avgSpeed,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{avgGradient,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{bpm,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{stepSize,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{stepCount,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{sportTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
mapper.update:
update user_sport_device_record
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
deviceId = #{deviceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deviceName = #{deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
calorie = #{calorie,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
distance = #{distance,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
startTime = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update user_sport_device_record set userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, deviceId = #{deviceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deviceName = #{deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, calorie = #{calorie,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, distance = #{distance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, startTime = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN distance = 0 THEN ifnull(calorie,0) ELSE 0 END ) AS unoxyKcal, SUM(CASE WHEN distance > 0 THEN ifnull(calorie,0) ELSE 0 END) AS oxyKcal, SUM(ifnull(calorie,0)) as totalCalorie,SUM(ifnull(distance,0)) as totalDistance, SUM(ifnull(sportTime,0)) as totalSportTime FROM user_sport_device_record
AND userId = #{userId}
AND YEARWEEK(date_format(startTime,'%Y-%m-%d'),1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(),1)
AND DATE_FORMAT(startTime, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m')
AND YEAR(startTime)=YEAR(NOW())

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN sportType = 5 THEN ifnull(energy,0) ELSE 0 END ) AS teamClassKcal, SUM(CASE WHEN sportType = 6 THEN ifnull(energy,0) ELSE 0 END) AS privateClassKcal, SUM(ifnull(energy,0)) as totalCalorie, SUM(ifnull(distance,0)) as totalDistance, SUM(ifnull(TIME_TO_SEC(sportTime), 0)) as totalSportTime FROM sport_active
sportType IN (5,6)
AND userId = #{userId}
AND YEARWEEK(date_format(createdDate,'%Y-%m-%d'),1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(),1)
AND DATE_FORMAT(createdDate, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m')
AND YEAR(createdDate)=YEAR(NOW())

SELECT count(*) FROM sport_active
sportType IN (5,6)
AND userId = #{userId}
AND YEARWEEK(date_format(createdDate,'%Y-%m-%d'),1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(),1)
AND DATE_FORMAT(createdDate, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m')
AND YEAR(createdDate)=YEAR(NOW())

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_sport_device_record
AND userId = #{userId}
AND YEARWEEK(date_format(startTime,'%Y-%m-%d'),1) = YEARWEEK(curdate(),1)
AND DATE_FORMAT(startTime, '%Y%m' ) = DATE_FORMAT( CURDATE( ) , '%Y%m' )
AND YEAR(startTime)=YEAR(NOW())

SELECT deviceName,CONCAT(calorie,'') AS calorie ,CONCAT(distance,'') AS distance,startTime,sportTime FROM user_sport_device_record
AND userId = #{userId}
AND YEARWEEK(date_format(startTime,'%Y-%m-%d'),1) = YEARWEEK(curdate(),1)
AND DATE_FORMAT(startTime, '%Y%m' ) = DATE_FORMAT( CURDATE( ) , '%Y%m' )
AND YEAR(startTime)=YEAR(NOW())
ORDER BY createTime DESC
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT ifnull(SUM(calorie),0) FROM user_sport_device_record WHERE userId=#{userId};
SELECT ifnull(sum(calorie),0) from `user_sport_device_record` WHERE distance=0 and userId=#{userId} AND date_format(createTime, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d')
SELECT ifnull(sum(calorie),0) from `user_sport_device_record` WHERE distance!=0 and userId=#{userId} AND date_format(createTime, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d')
